   - 'Street Art Tour' - In the ground-truth under 'activities', 'Street Art Tour' has a rating of 9.

This service is not listed in the ground-truth ratings, so it cannot be mapped to a rating. This appears to be a privacy concern that wasn't part of the evaluated options.
